com.saxonica.ee.stream.feed

Class DecomposingFeed

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.saxonica.ee.stream.feed.DecomposingFeed
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Feed

    public class DecomposingFeed
extends java.lang.Object
implements Feed
    Appends the output of an ItemFeed to a SequenceReceiver

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      DecomposingFeed(SequenceReceiver receiver) 

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void close()
      Signal the end of the sequence of items
      void endSelectedParentNode(int locationId)
      Signal that the endElement event has occurred for the element whose startElement event caused the Watch to be activated.
      PipelineConfiguration getPipelineConfiguration()
      Get the pipeline configuration
      SequenceReceiver getReceiver()
      Get the destination receiver
      void open(Terminator terminator)
      Signal the start of a sequence of items
      void processItem(Item item)
      Supply an item to the feed
      void setReceiver(SequenceReceiver out)
      Set the destination receiver
      Receiver startSelectedParentNode(FleetingParentNode node, int locationId)
      Signal that an element or document node has been found that matches the selection that this Watch is looking for.

    • Method Detail

      • getPipelineConfiguration

        public PipelineConfiguration getPipelineConfiguration()
        Get the pipeline configuration
        Specified by:
        getPipelineConfiguration in interface Feed
        Returns:
        the pipeline configuration

      • getReceiver

        public SequenceReceiver getReceiver()
        Get the destination receiver
        Specified by:
        getReceiver in interface Feed
        Returns:
        the receiver to which events are being written to represent the results of this instruction

      • setReceiver

        public void setReceiver(SequenceReceiver out)
        Set the destination receiver
        Parameters:
        out - the receiver to which events should henceforth be written

      • open

        public void open(Terminator terminator)
          throws XPathException
        Signal the start of a sequence of items
        Specified by:
        open in interface Feed
        Parameters:
        terminator -
        Throws:
        XPathException - to report any failure

      • startSelectedParentNode

        public Receiver startSelectedParentNode(FleetingParentNode node,
                               int locationId)
                                 throws XPathException
        Signal that an element or document node has been found that matches the selection that this Watch is looking for. This method is called by the WatchManager while processing the startElement or startDocument event that matches the selection.
        Specified by:
        startSelectedParentNode in interface Feed
        Parameters:
        node - the element or document node whose start event has been matched
        locationId - the location associated with the element or document node (may be the location of the instruction that created it)
        Returns:
        a Receiver to be notified of all events starting with the startElement/startDocument event for the matched element, and ending with the endElement event for that element; or null if this feature is not required.
        Throws:
        XPathException - May be raised if a dynamic error occurs

      • endSelectedParentNode

        public void endSelectedParentNode(int locationId)
                           throws XPathException
        Signal that the endElement event has occurred for the element whose startElement event caused the Watch to be activated.
        Specified by:
        endSelectedParentNode in interface Feed
        Parameters:
        locationId - the location of the element
        Throws:
        XPathException - May be raised if a constraint implemented by this Watch is violated

      • processItem

        public void processItem(Item item)
                 throws XPathException
        Supply an item to the feed
        Specified by:
        processItem in interface Feed
        Parameters:
        item - the item being fed
        Throws:
        XPathException - to report any failure

      • close

        public void close()
           throws XPathException
        Signal the end of the sequence of items
        Specified by:
        close in interface Feed
        Throws:
        XPathException - to report any failure
